DP.440.0000:
Is that right? You’re a traveler?
Yes, it’s good to see other places!\f
DP.440.0001:
Do you know about Mt. Moon in
the Kanto region?\f
CLEFAIRY dancing under the moon...
It’s something I must see in my life.
DP.440.0002:
Have you heard of the Tin Tower
in the Johto region?\f
The rainbow-colored Pokémon...
I must see that during my lifetime.
DP.440.0003:
Do you know about the Space Center
in the Hoenn region?\f
A rocket launching into space...
I must see that during my lifetime.
DP.440.0004:
Have you heard of the Whirl Islands
in the Johto region?\f
The silver-colored Pokémon...
I must see that during my lifetime.
